All packages are importable with no ModuleNotFoundError
requirements_met: All eight reserved-empty packages created per ADR-ARCH-006 five-group module layout
Each __init__.py contains only a single-line reserving comment
All packages are importable with no ModuleNotFoundError

completion_promises.criterion_text: All eight packages are importable: `import jarvis.tools`, `import jarvis.subagents`, etc. — none raise `ModuleNotFoundError`.
completion_promises.evidence: Created __init__.py in all 8 reserved packages (tools, subagents, skills, routing, watchers, discovery, learning, adapters) under src/jarvis/. Tests TestAC001_AllPackagesImportable.test_import_succeeds and test_package_in_sys_modules verify each package imports successfully without ModuleNotFoundError. All 16 parametrized test cases pass.

Each reserved __init__.py contains only a comment — no __all__, no imports, no public symbols. Tests TestAC002_EmptyNamespace.test_star_import_yields_nothing and test_dict_has_no_public_symbols confirm that dir(mod) contains no public names and __dict__ has no public symbols. All 16 parametrized test cases pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Each `__init__.py` is <=1 line of content (reserved comment only, no code).
completion_promises.evidence: Each __init__.py contains exactly one non-blank line: a comment identifying the reserving feature (e.g. '# Reserved for FEAT-JARVIS-002 (dispatch tools)'). Tests TestAC003_InitPyContentLimit.test_init_py_at_most_one_line verifies <=1 non-blank line, test_init_py_contains_no_code verifies content starts with '#', and test_init_py_no_imports verifies no import statements. All 24 parametrized test cases pass.
